use_cases: User registration for web applications requiring email and password authentication
Account creation flows with inline validation feedback
Full-screen signup overlays for SaaS onboarding
Secure login forms with visual feedback on submission
Newsletter or membership signup with credential storage
ai_summary: A full-screen signup form component featuring email and password input fields with client-side validation, displaying error messages for invalid entries. The design employs glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur effects, linear gradients creating a dark atmospheric background with semi-transparent overlays, and includes a decorative sunburst icon element. Built as a self-contained form with submission handling and reset functionality.
